date_notes: Reported during 2015 federal election campaign. Exact directive date not publicly confirmed.
title_en: National newspaper chain directs papers to endorse governing party
title_fr: Une grande chaîne de journaux dirige ses journaux vers l'appui au parti au pouvoir
description_en: Reporting indicates Postmedia's leadership directed its newspapers to run editorial endorsements of the federal Conservative Party in the 2015 election — documented as a media-ownership event.
verification_notes: Handoff notes multiple Tier-2 sources exist but no single URL captured. Attach before publication.
